lines: Nagir’indim’igihumbi, Na bwo byananira Gusingiz’umucunguzi Ngo mbirangize neza.
Umfashe, Man’ihoraho nkwiz’icyubahiro cy’izina ryiza rya Yesu namamaz’ishimwe rye.
N’izina ridutinyura mu bwoba dufite ;ruhumuriz’ubabaye rikabyuts’uwaguye.
N’ukuri, Yes’ashobora, Gutsembahw ibyaha,Akesh’amaso ye Abacumuye bose.
Gipfamatwi, umva Yesu kiragi ririmba kimug’itere hejuru mpumyi tumbira Yesu.
